name: answers in one word
prompt: Answer in exactly one word: what color is a clear daytime sky?

name: respects uppercase instruction
prompt: Reply with the word yes in all capital letters, nothing else.

name: emits a small JSON object
prompt: Reply with only a JSON object with a single key ok set to the boolean true. No prose, no code fence.

name: lists the requested items
prompt: List three primary colors of light, one per line.
